## Summary

Explain the change in 1–2 sentences. Link related issues.

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added/updated for new behaviour
- [ ] Lint/format pass locally (ruff)
- [ ] Types pass locally (mypy)
- [ ] Security implications considered (redirects, CSP, secrets)
- [ ] Docs updated if needed (README/CONTRIBUTING)
